title: Is the Eva Size Still Inconsistent
display_title: Is the Eva Size Still Inconsistent
wikitext:
[]: Is the Eva Size Still Inconsistent?             Quote Post by NAveryW » Tue Mar 24, 2009 10:50 pm I forgot to look and don't currently have access to 1.0. Someone else look for me.

[]:             Quote Post by Rodeo » Wed Mar 25, 2009 7:51 am It's consistent with the show, and I don't think the show did anything wacky with the size until episode 8. So it might be a little too early to tell.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Mar 25, 2009 7:58 am Rodeo wrote: It's consistent with the show, and I don't think the show did anything wacky with the size until episode 8.

[]:             Quote Post by Rodeo » Wed Mar 25, 2009 8:17 am Nothing, I just discovered all those boats weren't the same size.

chunks.content:
Article: Is the Eva Size Still Inconsistent
[]: Is the Eva Size Still Inconsistent?             Quote Post by NAveryW » Tue Mar 24, 2009 10:50 pm I forgot to look and don't currently have access to 1.0. Someone else look for me.

[]:             Quote Post by Rodeo » Wed Mar 25, 2009 7:51 am It's consistent with the show, and I don't think the show did anything wacky with the size until episode 8. So it might be a little too early to tell.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Mar 25, 2009 7:58 am Rodeo wrote: It's consistent with the show, and I don't think the show did anything wacky with the size until episode 8.

[]:             Quote Post by Rodeo » Wed Mar 25, 2009 8:17 am Nothing, I just discovered all those boats weren't the same size.
